package rulecoverage

func NegativeRowByRowUpsertLoop() string {
    ruleID := "row_by_row_upsert_loop"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Upsert-style writes executed row by row inside loops instead of batched."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
